creator: markd@Kermodei.COM
text:
Upgrading from 4.0 to 4.2, several executable were not upgraded.
        The following files were found to be out-of-date and had to be installed
        by hand:
bin/ed
bin/ls
bin/ps
bin/red
sbin/ifconfig
sbin/init
usr/bin/chfn
usr/bin/chpass
usr/bin/chsh
usr/bin/du
usr/bin/login
usr/bin/netstat
usr/bin/passwd
usr/bin/telnet
usr/bin/ypchfn
usr/bin/ypchpass
usr/bin/ypchsh
usr/bin/yppasswd
usr/lib/libtelnet.a
usr/libexec/rshd
usr/libexec/telnetd
usr/sbin/inetd
usr/sbin/ppp
usr/sbin/pppd
usr/sbin/syslogd
usr/sbin/tcpdump

Fix: 

: 
        Unknown
How-To-Repeat:         Don't know if this is reproducable; encountered this once before in
        an upgrade.
